feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: PhD Candidate in Computational Science & Applied Mathematics

entry.title: Joining Google X, the Moonshot Factory as an AI Resident

link.title: Joining Google X, the Moonshot Factory as an AI Resident

entry.content: Working on an undisclosed project related to finance, decarbonization, and climate at Google X, the moonshot factory.
entry.summary: Joining X, the Moonshot Factory as an AI/ML Resident, working on projects at the intersection of AI, finance, decarbonization, and climate.
